articles.headline: Gilead's M&A pace to slow after $15B deal trio
articles.summary: <cite index="11-1,11-3">Gilead completed three major acquisitions totaling $14.77 billion in 2026: Tubulis for $5B, Arcellx for $7.59B, and Ouro Medicines for $2.18B</cite>. <cite index="14-3,14-16">CFO Andrew Dickinson signaled a shift toward integration activities and more routine business development transactions after this acquisition spree</cite>. <cite index="13-4">CEO Daniel O'Day highlighted 2026 as having five Phase 3 updates and up to 10 potential new launches through 2027</cite>.
articles.why_it_matters: <cite index="15-10,15-11">The deals expand Gilead's oncology portfolio with differentiated next-generation ADC platform capabilities and promising cancer programs beyond HIV</cite>.

articles.headline: Value Investors Insight: Energy & Financials – Opportunity in Uncertainty
articles.summary: <cite index="1-5,7-4,7-7,9-2">Energy emerged as the standout performer in Q1 2026 amid geopolitical tensions and supply disruptions, with the sector surging 36% and reaching a 33.6% return</cite>. <cite index="1-1,1-5">Cambridge Associates advises investors to rebalance portfolios with greater diversification and prioritize electricity transmission value chain investments in 2026</cite>. <cite index="7-30,7-36">Valuations in Latin America trade at a 51% discount to emerging markets peers, presenting opportunities amid global uncertainty</cite>.
articles.why_it_matters: <cite index="1-20,1-22,1-23">The US dollar's multi-year bear market creates strategic currency positioning opportunities for global portfolio allocation</cite>.

articles.headline: AI scaling towards personal superintelligence: Meta's Muse Spark
articles.summary: <cite index="3d22ef968acd848b">Meta announced Muse Spark, described as 'scaling towards personal superintelligence'</cite>. <cite index="1-10,1-11">Large AI companies are consuming increasing portions of cash flow through capex, with capex now accounting for 75% of operating cash flows (up from 45% in 2024)</cite>. <cite index="1-12,1-13">Beyond mega-cap tech firms, AI offers cost reduction and margin expansion opportunities for companies that can leverage the technology effectively</cite>.
articles.why_it_matters: <cite index="1-9,1-10">The AI ecosystem's 'circularity' where companies are simultaneously customers, suppliers, and investors could mask underlying demand and profitability issues</cite>.
